entry.note: <L>19412<pc>112,2<k1>aS<k2>aS<h>1<e>1 <hom>1.</hom> <s>aS</s> ¦ (in <lang>classical Sanskṛt</lang> only) <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>aSnute</s> (<ab>aor.</ab> 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>ASizata</s>, <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls>; <ab>perf.</ab> <s>AnaSe</s>, <ls>Pāṇ. vii, 4, 72.</ls> Vedic forms are: <s>aSnoti</s>, &c.; <ab>Subj.</ab> <s>aSnavat</s>, &c.; <ab>aor.</ab> <ab>P.</ab> <s>Anaw</s> (2. & 3. <ab>sg.</ab>, frequently in <ls>RV.</ls>) and <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>azwa</s> or <s>A/zwa</s>, 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>ASata</s> (frequently in <ls>RV.</ls>) or <s>A/kzizur</s> [<ls>RV. i, 163, 10</ls>] <ab>Subj.</ab> <s>a/kzat</s> [<ls>RV. x, 11, 7</ls>] <ab>Pot.</ab> 1. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>aSema</s> <ab>Prec.</ab> <s>aSyAs</s> (2. & 3. <ab>sg.</ab>) &c. <ab>Pot.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> 1. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>aSIya</s> and <ab>pl.</ab> <s>aSImahi</s>, <ab>Imper.</ab> <s>azwu</s> [<ls>VS.</ls>]; <ab>perf.</ab> <s>AnaMSa</s> (thrice in <ls>RV.</ls>) or <s>AnASa</s> [<ls>RV. vi, 16, 26</ls>] or <s>ASa</s> [<ls>RV. viii, 47, 6</ls>], 2. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>AnaSa/</s>, 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>AnaSu/H</s> (frequently in <ls>RV.</ls>) or <s>ASuH</s> [<ls>RV. iv, 33, 4</ls>], <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>AnaSe/</s>, <ab>Subj.</ab> 1. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>anaSAmahE</s> [<ls>RV. viii, 27, 22</ls>], <ab>Pot.</ab> 1. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>AnasyAm</s>, <ab>p.</ab> <s>AnaSAna/</s> [<ls>AV.</ls>]; <ab>Inf.</ab> <s>azwave</s>, <ls>RV. iv, 30, 19</ls>) <div n="to"/>to reach, come to, reach, come to, arrive at, get, gain, obtain, <ls>RV.</ls> &c.; <div n="to"/> (said of an evil, <s>aMhati</s>, <s>a/Mhas</s>, <s>grA/hi</s>) to visit, <ls>RV.</ls>; <l ... [truncated]

<L>6878<pc>1-0506<k1>aS<k2>aS<h>1 1. {#aS#}¦ {#(aMS), aSno/ti#} und {#aSnute/#}; potent. {#aSyA/m, aSIya/, aSIma/hi#}; imperat. {#azwu#}; imperf. 3. sg. {#azwa#}, pl. {#A/Sata#}, du. {#ASATe, ASAte#} (nach dem Metrum: {#ASaTe, ASate)#}; aor. {#Akzat, Akzizus#} (hierher nach <ls>DEVAR.</ls> {#ASizaH#} <ls>NAIGH. 3,21</ls>); {#a/Sat#} <ls>NAIGH. 2,18.</ls> {#aSema; A/naw, AnaSyAm; anaSAmahE#} <ls>ṚV. 8,27,22</ls>; {#ASizata#} 3. pl. (<ls>BHAṬṬ. 15,43</ls>); perf. {#ASa, ASus; Ana/MSaH AnaSe/#} ( <ls>P. 7,4,72.</ls> <ls>VOP. 8,53.</ls> <ls n="VOP.">12,6</ls>), {#AnaSu/s; AnaSe/, AnaSire#}; part. perf. {#AnaSAna/#}; fut. {#aSizyate; aSitA#} oder {#azwA#} <ls>VOP. 8,79</ls>; inf. {#aSitum#} . In der klass. Sprache nur med. <div n="1"> 1) {%erreichen, anlangen —, eintreffen bei%}: {#sa\dyo a\syADvana^H pA\rama^SnuTa#} <ls>ṚV. 5,54,10.</ls> {#a\SI\mahi^ gA\Damu\ta pra^ti\zWAm#} <ls n="ṚV. 5,">47,7.</ls> {#a\SyAmAyU^Mzi suDi^tAni\ pUrvA^#} <ls n="ṚV.">2,27,10.</ls> {#i\yamindra\M varu^Ramazwa me\ gIH#} <ls n="ṚV.">7,84,5.</ls> {#ta\ptA Ga\rmA a^Snuvate visa\rgam#} {%erreichen ihr Ende%} <ls n="ṚV. 7,">103,9.</ls> {#yaM jI\vama\SnavA^mahE#} <ls n="ṚV.">10,97,17.</ls> {#ko de^va\yanta^maSnavat#} <ls n="ṚV.">1,40,7.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">52,14.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">116,25.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">121,16.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">163,10.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">7,65,2.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,126,1.</ls> {#tato^ mA\ dravi^Ramazwu#} <ls>VS. 8,60.</ls> <ls n="VS.">7,3.</ls> <ls n="VS. 7,">6.</ls> <ls>ŚAT. BR. 6,3,1,20.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">12,9,3,13.</ls> {#yaddadAti ga ... [truncated]

<L>11445<pc>1-134-c<k1>aS<k2>aS<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> √{#aS#}¦, {#aSno/ti#} und {#aSnute#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%gelangen zu%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>), {%erreichen; einholen%}. {#kakuBaH#} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%nach allen Weltgegenden hin sich zerstreuen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%erlangen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%treffen, über Jmd kommen%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%bewältigen%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%darbringen, darreichen%}. <div n="1">— 6〉 {%geniessen%} <ls>Spr. 3067</ls>. <div n="1">— 7〉 *{%durchdringen, erfüllen%}. <div n="1">— 8〉 *{%anhäufen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#anu#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%gleichkommen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%erlangen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%gelangen zu, erreichen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%erlangen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%bewältigen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#A#} {%erreichen%}. — {#prAyamASizye#} [Page1-135-a] und — {#ASitum#} fehlerhaft für — {#Asizye#} und {#Asitum#}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ud#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%gelangen zu, erreichen%} <ls>ŚAT. BR. 4,2,1,26</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%gleichkommen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%beherrschen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#upa#} {%erlangen, theilhaftig werden%} (auch eines Uebels). — {#prAyamupASizye#} fehlerhaft für. — {#upAsizye#}. <div n="p">— Mit {#samupa#} {%theilhaftig werden%} <ls>Spr. 6426</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#pari#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%gelangen zu, erreichen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%erlangen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pra#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%gelangen zu, erreichen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%erlangen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%zu Theil werden%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#prati#}, <ab>Partic.</ab> {#pratyazwa#} etwas {%Jmdn%}. (<ab>Loc.</ab> ... [truncated]
